title: Busy Boyz scrum to glory
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Mayoral Rugby Tournament...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Mayoral Rugby Tournament that took place this past Sunday at the Safe Hub Multi Sport Centre in White Location, proved to be very successful, with all the teams thoroughly entertaining the crowd.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Mayoral Rugby Tournament that took place this past Sunday at the Safe Hub Multi Sport Centre in White Location, proved to be very successful, with all the teams thoroughly entertaining the crowd."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Participating teams included Busy Boyz, Eagle Stars, Young Brothers, Green Lovers, Red Army and Knysna United, among others.","html":"Participating teams included Busy Boyz, Eagle Stars, Young Brothers, Green Lovers, Red Army and Knysna United, among others."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the high-energy final, Busy Boyz dominated Eagle Stars, securing a memorable 43-17 win."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The tournament ended in spectacular fashion, reigniting the passion for rugby in the town and highlighting the fierce determination of every team involved.","html":"The tournament ended in spectacular fashion, reigniting the passion for rugby in the town and highlighting the fierce determination of every team involved."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
